arts.ttl: Three Chelsea stars drop early team news hints for FC Copenhagen game in Enzo Maresca boost
arts.sum: Moises Caicedo, Malo Gusto and Benoit Badiashile are among the Chelsea players who have posted pre-match graphics on to their Instagram stories, hinting that they may start in Copenhagen. Badiashile's hint comes after Maresca confirmed that he and Trevoh Chalobah were ready to play after recovering from injury.

arts.ttl: He was one of Chelsea's top prospects alongside Reece James but now he's playing in Serie A with zero goals in 17 games
arts.sum: If you look around European football now, so many former Chelsea youngsters can be spotted all over the place. The Chelsea academy has been one...

arts.ttl: FIFA confirm Chelsea cash windfall from boosted Club World Cup prize pot
arts.sum: Chelsea and Manchester City are in line for a slice of a whopping $1billion prize fund as they gear up for this summer's Club World Cup. City's request to postpone their opening league fixture to allow players a longer summer break after the Club World Cup was denied.

arts.ttl: Three reasons why Samu Aghehowa will snub Chelsea for Arsenal this summer, one is completely understandable - opinion
arts.sum: He's being linked to both London clubs.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s current players must follow this Frank Lampard example – opinion
arts.sum: If I was a professional footballer, there are some former players who I would look up to but not only that, study. I would find out what they used to do, how they used to train, what they would eat, anything else they would do, and I’d do that and more to get to the […]

arts.ttl: What Chelsea did to anger Harry Redknapp at Tottenham back in 2011, he found it 'pretty poor'
'Offer on the table': Chelsea have made move to sign Premier League goalkeeper this summer - journalist
arts.sum: Could be the answer to our GK woes...

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal chooses Chelsea target as DREAM Barcelona signing
arts.sum: The Blaugrana are widely expected to sign a new striker during the 2025 summer transfer window and Yamal believes that Aghehowa is perfectly suited to joining the Camp Nou side, according to El Nacional . Lamine Yamal has reportedly urged Barcelona to sign FC Porto forward Samu Aghehowa as a long-term replacement for Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Arsenal wonderkids Ethan Nwaneri and Myles Lewis-Skelly set for England promotion, Real Madrid and Bayern Munich battle Chelsea and Tottenham for £50m centre back and Man City make swoop for future star
arts.sum: THE SAMI MOKBEL COLUMN: Arsenal teenager is Ethan Nwaneri is being considered for an England promotion following his brilliant form for Mikel Arteta's side.

arts.ttl: Report: The interesting clause Chelsea included in Joao Felix’s AC Milan loan, it could impact them this summer
